titleZh: 中国《公司法》司法解释五：少数股东权益保护
titleEn: The Fifth Judicial Interpretation on PRC Company Law to Protect Minority Shareholders' Interests
abstractZh: 解读最高法关于少数股东保护的第五次司法解释及其对关联交易、赔偿请求和董事高管责任追究的影响。
abstractEn: Explains the Fifth Interpretation on minority-shareholder protection and the enforcement consequences for control-related transactions and connected-party conduct.
